ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Fermented milk drink, plain, skimmed milk

ingredients_text: strawberry flavour jelly (34%) [water, sugar, gelling agent: pectins, acidity regulators: citric acid, sodium citrates, calcium phosphates, plant extract (black carrot concentrate), flavouring, colour: concentrated grape extract], custard (32%) (water, skimmed milk concentrate, sugar, cream (milk), modified maize starch, gelling agent: pectins, flavouring, colour: carotenes), stabilised cream (17%) (cream (milk), skimmed milk, dextrose, buttermilk powder, stabilisers:  diphosphates, sodium alginate), strawberries (12%), sponge (4,5%) (wheat flour, sugar, pasteurised egg), allergy advice: for allergens, see ingredients in bold, may also contain nuts, dietary advice: suitable for vegetarians, no artificial colours or flavourings,
